evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 33164742. 2021/02/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: Numerous studies have reported the incidence and outcomes of 
injuries in the men's and women's National Basketball Association (NBA and WNBA, 
respectively).
PURPOSE: To synthesize published data regarding the incidence and outcomes of 
all injuries in the NBA and WNBA in a comprehensive review.
STUDY DESIGN: Systematic review; Level of evidence, 4.
METHODS: Following PRISMA (Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and 
Meta-Analyses)
